display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Large, welcoming, with subtle letter-spacing.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Clear hierarchy below display.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Maximum lift for major interactive elements.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Quick state changes (hover colors, border shifts).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Gradient coral-to-rose, white text, rounded-lg.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 24px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFCDB2 0%, #E5989B 100%); color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.15); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.35), 0 0 30px rgba(255, 205, 178, 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(-1px) scale(0.98); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary actions. White background, coral border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 24px; border: 2px solid #FFE5D9; cursor: pointer; background: #FFFFFF; color: #4A4A4A; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.1); transition: all 0.3s ease; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-btn-secondary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 0; background: #FFE5D9; transition: height 0.3s ease; z-index: -1; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover::after { height: 100%; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02); border-color: #FFCDB2; }

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Programming languages, frameworks, tools. Small rounded pills.
components.css: .ds-skill-tag { display: inline-flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 14px; background: #FFF8F0; border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #4A4A4A; border: 1px solid #FFE5D9; transition: all 0.2s ease; cursor: default; } .ds-skill-tag:hover { background: #FFE5D9; border-color: #FFCDB2; transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.2); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.css: .ds-nav-link { padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; color: #4A4A4A; border-radius: 16px; transition: all 0.2s ease; position: relative; } .ds-nav-link::before { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 5px; left: 50%; width: 0; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFCDB2 0%, #E5989B 100%); border-radius: 2px; transition: all 0.3s ease; transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-nav-link:hover::before, .ds-nav-link.active::before { width: calc(100% - 24px); } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.active { background: #FFE5D9; color: #E5989B; transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Cosplay Card
components.description: Gallery card with slideshow and hover lift.
components.html:
Childe / Tartaglia

Genshin Impact
components.css: .ds-cosplay-card { break-inside: avoid; margin-bottom: 20px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.95) 0%, rgba(255,248,240,0.9) 100%); border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.15); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 205, 178, 0.2); } .ds-cosplay-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 25px 60px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.25); transform: translateY(-10px) scale(1.02); border-color: rgba(255, 205, 178, 0.5); } .ds-cosplay-image img { width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; object-fit: cover; } .ds-cosplay-info { padding: 20px; } .ds-cosplay-info h3 { font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 700; color: #4A4A4A; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-cosplay-info p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #E5989B; margin: 0; }

components.name: Project Link Button
components.description: External link for projects. Dream blue for web, neutral for GitHub.
components.html: Cek Website
components.css: .ds-project-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; border-radius: 16px; font-family: 'Quicksand', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.2s ease; } .ds-project-link.web { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #CAE9FF 0%, #A2D2FF 100%); color: #2563eb; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(162, 210, 255, 0.4); } .ds-project-link.web:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #A2D2FF 0%, #7ab8f5 100%); transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(162, 210, 255, 0.5); } .ds-project-link.github { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F5EBE0 0%, #e8e0d5 100%); color: #4A4A4A; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); } .ds-project-link.github:hover { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFE5D9 0%, #FFCDB2 100%); transform: translateY(-3px) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(229, 152, 155, 0.3); color: #FFFFFF; }

narrative.overview: A warm creative workspace where code meets costume. The design captures the duality of Ghifari's identity — programmer and cosplayer — in a space that feels like an afternoon in a well-loved studio: soft light, comfortable surfaces, and the quiet satisfaction of craft. Every element feels handmade and personal, never template-driven or AI-generated. The atmosphere is soft and dreamy — warm cream backgrounds meet gentle coral and dusty rose accents, with touches of dream blue and soft lilac that evoke the fantastical world of cosplay.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream base with coral/rose accent gradient
Soft shadows that respond to interaction (appear on hover/focus)
Rounded, friendly shapes throughout (24-32px radii on major elements)
Clean typography with subtle motion — nothing bouncy or aggressive
Floating decorative elements (leaves, stars) that add personality without distraction

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: Never use pure black (#000000) or pure white (#FFFFFF) for text or backgrounds respectively. The palette's warmth is the point; stark contrast breaks the cozy atmosphere.

rules.name: The Friendly Weight Rule
rules.body: Heavy weights (700) reserved for headings only. Body text stays at 400-500. The contrast creates hierarchy without shouting.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, focus). Never use shadows decoratively.

dos: Do use the warm coral/rose gradient as the primary accent. It carries the brand personality.
Do maintain generous rounded corners (24px+) throughout. The softness is intentional.
Do use Quicksand for headings and Nunito for body text. The pairing is deliberate.
Do include subtle motion on interactive elements. Hover lifts, focus states, and shimmer effects.
Do use floating decorative elements (emoji) for personality. Keep them subtle and non-interactive.
Do follow the two-identity-as-strength principle. Both programming and cosplay sections should feel cohesive.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Solid colors only.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px) as decorative accents.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. The glass navbar is functional (visibility + blur), not aesthetic excess.
Don't add eyebrow labels above every section (e.g., "ABOUT", "PORTFOLIO").
Don't use the hero-metric template (big number + small label).
Don't let text overflow containers. Test headings at every breakpoint.
Don't use template or AI-generated aesthetic patterns. The Cozy Atelier should feel personal and handcrafted.
